description_long: This is a standard claw hammer with a metallic head and a straight handle. The head features a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side for nail removal. The handle appears to be cylindrical and is likely made of wood or a composite material, with a reddish-brown coloration. The metallic head is silver-gray, contrasting with the handle. The hammer is compact and lightweight, suitable for general carpentry or household tasks. There are no visible signs of branding, wear, or additional attachments.
description: A compact claw hammer with a silver metallic head and a reddish-brown straight handle, designed for striking and nail removal.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing the full length of the handle and the profile of the head, including the claw.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the front, highlighting the flat striking face and the narrow width of the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the handle and the head, with the claw visible on the far side.
description_view_3: The hammer is seen from the back, focusing on the curved claw and the end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical, smooth surface, reddish-brown coloration, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head, metallic, with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
